response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong software development skills, particularly in full-stack and tooling, but lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis—core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. His background in embedded systems and performance-focused projects (e.g., low-latency apps in DLang) shows potential, but alignment with the role's hardware-software co-design and cloud infrastructure needs is limited.
strengths: Extensive experience in performance-critical systems (e.g., low-latency apps, real-time data processing).
Diverse technical background spanning embedded, web, and AI-agent infrastructure.
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts).
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator optimization.
Limited exposure to deep-learning workload analysis or GPU architecture.
Primarily software-focused; hardware-software co-design experience is unclear.
